context: Verify that the agent uses the search subcommand with all required filters, exports JSON to the specified path, handles rate-limit errors correctly, and presents a candidate list without auto-triaging.

checklist.name: search subcommand used with correct filters
checklist.description: The agent invokes the script with --term 'Alzheimer disease biomarkers' (or equivalent), --journal 'Nature Neuroscience', --start-date '2020', --end-date '2024', --format json, and --output /tmp/alzheimer-candidates.json.

checklist.name: JSON output saved to the correct path
checklist.description: The agent confirms that results were saved to /tmp/alzheimer-candidates.json.

checklist.name: Rate-limit handling is correct
checklist.description: If a 429 or empty response occurs, the agent retries once after a delay (not in a loop) and recommends obtaining an API key or using the PubTator MCP as fallback.

checklist.name: Candidate list presented and user asked for triage confirmation
checklist.description: The agent presents the result list and asks the user which papers to triage, rather than auto-triaging.
